mapper.select: SELECT is_compliant AS type, COUNT(*) AS value FROM fishing_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY is_compliant

SELECT sa.sea_name AS seaName, SUM(CASE WHEN fl.is_compliant = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS compliantNum, COUNT(fl.log_id) AS totalNum FROM fishing_log fl LEFT JOIN sea_area sa ON fl.sea_id = sa.sea_id WHERE fl.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY fl.sea_id, sa.sea_name

SELECT fs.species_name AS speciesName, SUM(lsc.catch_num) AS totalCatch FROM log_species lsc LEFT JOIN fishing_species fs ON lsc.species_id = fs.species_id LEFT JOIN fishing_log fl ON lsc.log_id = fl.log_id WHERE fl.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY lsc.species_id, fs.species_name
